allow: Bash(npm info @vitejs/plugin-vue peerDependencies 2>&1 && npm ls vite @vitejs/plugin-vue --depth=0 2>&1)
Bash(pip install httpx aiosqlite -q 2>&1 | tail -3 && python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(which python && uv run python -c "import httpx; print\('httpx ok'\)" 2>&1 && ls .venv/lib/python*/site-packages/ | grep httpx)
Bash(dpkg -L docker.io | grep bin && /usr/bin/docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>&1 | head -5)

Bash(curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/static/stable/aarch64/docker-27.5.1.tgz | sudo tar -xz --strip-components=1 -C /usr/local/bin docker/docker 2>&1 && docker version --format '{{.Client.Version}}' 2>&1)
Bash(TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true uv run pytest tests/integration/test_db_integration.py -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -15)
Bash(TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true uv run pytest tests/integration/test_db_integration.py::test_user_crud_real_db -v --tb=long 2>&1 | grep "Error\\|FAILED\\|asyncpg\\|sql" | head -20)

Bash(python3 -c "
import socket
# The docker host is reachable via the gateway
with open\('/proc/net/route'\) as f:
    for line in f.readlines\(\)[1:]:
        parts = line.split\(\)
        if parts[1] == '00000000':  # default route
            gw = int\(parts[2], 16\)
            print\(f'{gw & 0xff}.{\(gw >> 8\) & 0xff}.{\(gw >> 16\) & 0xff}.{\(gw >> 24\) & 0xff}'\)
            break
")
Bash(python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket\(\); s.settimeout\(2\); s.connect\(\('postgres',5432\)\); s.close\(\); print\('postgres reachable'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(uv run python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine
from sqlalchemy import text
async def main\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\('postgresql+asyncpg://postgres:password@postgres:5432/rentify'\)
    async with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
        r = await conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='listings'::regclass AND contype='u'\\"\)\)
        print\(r.fetchall\(\)\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")
Bash(uv run alembic stamp 001 2>&1 && uv run alembic current 2>&1)
